style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. On the left, a small robot icon labelled AGENT with a speech bubble reading PUBLISH THIS APP. An arrow leads rightward through a box labelled CONTAINERIZE to a rounded cloud box labelled GOOGLE CLOUD holding a small running box labelled APP. Above, a simple person token labelled USER hands a small key icon labelled DELEGATED ACCESS down to the AGENT, beside a small clock and a label reading EXPIRES EVERY FEW HOURS. A small caption tag near the agent reads ACTS ON THE USER'S BEHALF. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people beyond a schematic token. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
composed_prompt:
